tasks.subject: Task 1: Package build files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `setup.py` and `default.nix` so Nix can build the `tasks_ui` package.

**Files:**
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/setup.py`
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/default.nix`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `setup.py` defines entry point `tasks_ui = tasks_ui:run`
- [ ] `default.nix` lists `flask` and `task-tools` in `propagatedBuildInputs`
- [ ] `default.nix` copies `templates/main.html` to the Nix output in `prePatch`

**Verify:** `cat pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/setup.py | grep tasks_ui` → shows entry point line

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/setup.py", "pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/default.nix"], "verifyCommand": "cat pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/setup.py | grep tasks_ui", "acceptanceCriteria": ["setup.py defines entry point tasks_ui = tasks_ui:run", "default.nix lists flask and task-tools in propagatedBuildInputs", "default.nix copies templates/main.html in prePatch"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Flask backend with tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement `tasks_ui.py` with a `create_app` factory and streaming `/submit` route, verified by unit tests.

**Files:**
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/tasks_ui.py`
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/tests/__init__.py`
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/tests/test_tasks_ui.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `GET /` returns 200
- [ ] `POST /submit` with missing or empty `name` returns 400
- [ ] `POST /submit` with non-JSON body returns 400
- [ ] `POST /submit` with valid args returns `text/event-stream` with one SSE event per date
- [ ] When `putTask` raises, that date emits `status: error` and streaming continues
- [ ] Multi-day range emits one event per day from start to end inclusive

**Verify:** `cd pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui && python -m pytest tests/ -v` → all 7 tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/tasks_ui.py", "pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/tests/__init__.py", "pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/tests/test_tasks_ui.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui && python -m pytest tests/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET / returns 200", "POST /submit with missing name returns 400", "POST /submit with non-JSON returns 400", "POST /submit streams text/event-stream with one event per date", "API failure emits status:error for that date without stopping stream", "Multi-day range emits one event per day"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: HTML template
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `templates/main.html` — the single-page form with real-time SSE results list.

**Files:**
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/templates/main.html`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Form has task name, start date (defaults to today), optional end date, notes toggle, upload button
- [ ] Results list populates row by row as SSE events arrive
- [ ] OK rows green, error rows red with message
- [ ] Upload button disabled while streaming
- [ ] Form resets and results clear after 2s on full success
- [ ] Results stay on any error for retry

**Verify:** `grep 'Upload Tasks' pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/templates/main.html` → shows h1 tag

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/templates/main.html"], "verifyCommand": "grep 'Upload Tasks' pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/templates/main.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Form has name, start date, end date, notes toggle, upload button", "Start date defaults to today via JS", "SSE stream reads events and populates results list", "OK rows green, error rows red with message", "Form resets on full success after 2s", "Results stay on error for retry"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: NixOS module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `module.nix` to define the `tasks_ui` NixOS service with systemd + nginx proxy + web services registration.

**Files:**
- Create: `pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/module.nix`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Declares options.services.tasks_ui with enable, package, port, subdomain
- [ ] Registers Tasks in machines.base.webServices
- [ ] systemd service runs tasks_ui binary with port and subdomain args
- [ ] nginx proxy configured for /tasks/ path
- [ ] ReadWritePaths includes /

**Verify:** `nix-instantiate --parse pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/module.nix` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/module.nix"], "verifyCommand": "nix-instantiate --parse pkgs/python-packages/flasks/tasks_ui/module.nix", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Declares options.services.tasks_ui with enable, package, port, subdomain", "Registers Tasks in machines.base.webServices", "systemd service runs tasks_ui binary", "nginx proxy configured for /tasks/", "ReadWritePaths includes /"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Nix wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire `tasks_ui` into the Nix package set, service-ports, index, and pc-base.nix.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pkgs/nixos/service-ports.nix`
- Modify: `pkgs/default.nix`
- Modify: `index.json`
- Modify: `pkgs/nixos/pc-base.nix`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] service-ports.nix contains tasks_ui = 5959
- [ ] pkgs/default.nix pySelf overlay has tasks_ui addDoc entry
- [ ] pkgs/default.nix rec block has tasks_ui = final.python313.pkgs.tasks_ui
- [ ] index.json python array has tasks_ui entry with ci=true docs=true
- [ ] pc-base.nix imports tasks_ui module.nix
- [ ] pc-base.nix enables services.tasks_ui when isATS
- [ ] All tasks_ui files are git-tracked (no untracked files)

**Verify:** `git status` → no untracked tasks_ui files remain

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkgs/nixos/service-ports.nix", "pkgs/default.nix", "index.json", "pkgs/nixos/pc-base.nix"], "verifyCommand": "git status", "acceptanceCriteria": ["service-ports.nix contains tasks_ui = 5959", "pkgs/default.nix pySelf overlay has tasks_ui addDoc entry", "pkgs/default.nix rec block has tasks_ui = final.python313.pkgs.tasks_ui", "index.json python array has tasks_ui entry", "pc-base.nix imports tasks_ui module.nix", "pc-base.nix enables services.tasks_ui when isATS", "no untracked tasks_ui files in git status"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Deploy and smoke-test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Deploy the tasks_ui to the ATS machine and verify the UI is accessible and functional.

**Files:** (no new files)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] anix-upgrade --local completes without build errors
- [ ] systemctl status tasks_ui shows active (running)
- [ ] curl http://localhost:5959/tasks/ returns Upload Tasks page
- [ ] Tasks link appears on ATS root landing page
- [ ] Form submission produces green checkmark row

**Verify:** `curl -s http://localhost:5959/tasks/ | grep 'Upload Tasks'` → shows page title

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "curl -s http://localhost:5959/tasks/ | grep 'Upload Tasks'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["anix-upgrade --local completes without errors", "systemctl status tasks_ui shows active (running)", "curl http://localhost:5959/tasks/ returns Upload Tasks page", "Tasks link appears on ATS root landing page", "Form submission produces green checkmark row"]}
```
